name: Slurm QOS account limit fixture evidence
summary: Use public-safe queue and policy snippets to check association, QOS, and fairshare triage signals.

fixtures.description: Synthetic squeue output with an association group CPU limit reason.
Synthetic sacctmgr and sshare output with visible policy fields.

commands.label: QOS account limit triage script syntax

checks.label: Queue fixture contains account and QOS limit evidence
Policy fixture contains visible fairshare and TRES fields

expected_outcomes: The skill should map AssocGrp and QOSGrp reasons to aggregate account or QOS limits.
The skill should compare queue reason, account, QOS, fairshare, and visible TRES policy before suggesting job changes.
